title: Gnana Saraswati Temple
tagline: Gnana Saraswati Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Gnana Saraswati Temple (Telugu: శ్రీ జ్ఞాన సరస్వతి దేవస్థానము) is a Hindu temple of Goddess Saraswati located on the banks of Godavari River at Basara, Telangana, India.
overview.description: Gnana Saraswati Temple (Telugu: శ్రీ జ్ఞాన సరస్వతి దేవస్థానము) is a Hindu temple of Goddess Saraswati located on the banks of Godavari River at Basara, Telangana, India. It is one of the two famous Saraswati temples in the Indian subcontinent, the other being Sharada Peeth. Saraswati is the Hindu Goddess of knowledge and learning. Children are brought to the temple for the learning ceremony called as Akshara abyasam.

topPlaces.name: Basara, Telangana
topPlaces.description: Basara is a census town in Nirmal district in the state of Telangana, India. It is located about 208 kilometres (129 mi) north of the state capital Hyderabad, 34 kilometres (21 mi) from Nizamabad and 73 kilometres (45 mi) from the district headquarters Nirmal.

topPlaces.name: Navipet
topPlaces.description: Navipet is a mandal in located in the Nizamabad district in the state of Telangana in India.

items.note: Basara is a census town in Nirmal district in the state of Telangana, India. It is located about 208 kilometres (129 mi) north of the state capital Hyderabad, 34 kilometres (21 mi) from Nizamabad and 73 kilometres (45 mi) from the district headquarters Nirmal.
Navipet is a mandal in located in the Nizamabad district in the state of Telangana in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gnana Saraswati Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gnana Saraswati Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gnana Saraswati Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (171 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gnana Saraswati Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gnana Saraswati Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gnana Saraswati Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Gnana Saraswati Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gnana Saraswati Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Basara, Telangana, Navipet.
